lsp.justification: Matches the GT on the substantive shared state: per-worker bio_jobs and bio_jobs_counter guarded by bio_mutex[worker], separate bio_comp_list/bio_mutex_comp, unlocked job_comp_pipe with pipe atomicity/thread-creation ordering, the three redisAtomic AOF fsync fields, and immutable server.bio_cpulist. It also correctly excludes bio_threads and notes job objects are handed off rather than concurrently shared; the only minor omission is not listing mutex/condvar globals as separate shared-state entries, but it names them correctly as the synchronization primitives.
